user_message: Which component contributes the most emissions in my T-shirt analysis?
db_context:
Product: T-shirt Clean
Total footprint: 38.3 kg CO2e
Line items:
- body / cotton fabric: 25.0 kg CO2e (65.3%)
- dye / reactive dye: 4.1 kg CO2e (10.7%)
- thread / nylon: 3.2 kg CO2e (8.4%)
- label / nylon: 3.2 kg CO2e (8.4%)
- Packaging / LDPE: 2.8 kg CO2e (7.3%)
Emission factors: Open CEDA 2025, Scope 3 Category 1, cradle-to-gate.
